SEARCH

Uses of Class
user.User

Packages that use User
Package
Description
notification
This package contains everything related to the notifications of the store.
store
It contains everything related to the management of the store.
user
It contains everything related to the different users of the store.
utilities
This package contains several utilities that are useful in the store.

    Obtains the user associated to the notification history

    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a new notification history

    Creates a new notification history
     
    NotificationHistory(User owner)
    Creates a new empty notification history
     
    NotificationHistory(User owner, NotificationSettings settings)
    Creates a new empty notification history

    Creates a new settings based on the type of user
